folders.name: Folder Name
folders.title: Folders ({{count}})
folders.delete_warning: Deleting a folder will also delete all feeds and articles within it
folders.analysis_archive_dir_placeholder: Leave empty to inherit parent or global directory
folders.analysis_archive_dir_hint: Current folder directory wins. If empty, it inherits from the nearest parent folder, then falls back to General Settings.
folders.archive_dir_save_failed: Failed to save folder archive directory

settings.title: Settings
settings.auto_readability_description: Automatically switch to reader mode when viewing articles
settings.ai_daily_report_api_key_description: Lets external systems call the AI daily report endpoint without logging in. Clear it and save to disable this access.
settings.ai_analysis_archive_dir_description: Root directory for Markdown files generated after AI analysis completes. Leave empty to use the server default.
settings.proxy_enabled_description: Access feeds through a proxy server
settings.advanced_domain_limits_description: Set request intervals for specific domains
settings.appearance_categories_description: Drag to reorder or hide categories in the sidebar switcher
settings.appearance_keep_one: Keep at least one category view

add_feed.title: Add Feed
add_feed.feed_description: Enter the URL of an RSS feed or website to subscribe
add_feed.feed_exists: This feed URL is already subscribed

entry.focus_description: Add custom tags here and the AI daily report will prioritize these articles and themes.
entry.focus_tags_placeholder: Press Enter to add tags, e.g. defense, energy, Europe
entry.export_tags_placeholder: Comma-separated tags, e.g. data, AI, research
entry.analysis_failed: AI analysis failed, please try again later
entry.analysis_endpoint_missing: The current backend does not provide the AI analysis endpoint. Restart the backend and make sure it is running the latest code.
entry.ai_processing_queued: AI has been queued for background processing and will appear automatically when ready.

ai_settings.analysis_model_hint: Used for structured article analysis, with its summary reused directly in article detail.
ai_settings.translation_model_hint: Used for full-text translation, title translation, and translated analysis titles stored in the library.
ai_settings.report_model_hint: Used to generate the three narrative sections: overview, risk review, and trend outlook.
ai_settings.openai_thinking_default_hint: When disabled, uses API endpoint default behavior
ai_settings.rate_limit_hint: Maximum API requests per second (1-100, default: 10)
ai_settings.worker_count_hint: Concurrent background AI analysis tasks (1-16, default: 2). Restart the backend after changing this value.
ai_settings.prompt_templates_hint: Edit the templates used by AI translation, analysis, and daily reports. Newly started requests will use the latest saved content.
ai_settings.prompt_templates_empty: No editable prompt templates are available.
ai_settings.prompt_templates_variables_empty: This template does not expose extra variables
ai_settings.prompt_templates_new_requests_hint: Updated templates only affect new AI requests. Existing stored results are not re-run automatically.
ai_settings.prompt_template_summary_hint: Used by the streaming summary path and older fallback summary flows.
ai_settings.prompt_template_translate_block_hint: Used for block-level HTML translation while preserving markup structure.
ai_settings.prompt_template_translate_text_hint: Used for titles, summaries, and other plain-text translation tasks.
ai_settings.prompt_template_analysis_hint: The main analysis prompt. Detail view content and stored analysis records both depend on this output.
ai_settings.prompt_template_daily_report_hint: Used to turn stored analyses into overview, risk review, and trend outlook sections.
ai_settings.prompt_template_coordinate_lookup_hint: Used when the system needs to enrich an analysis with a precise geographic location.
ai_settings.usage_hint: Tracks daily AI request counts plus estimated prompt, completion, and total tokens for analysis, translation, and daily reports.
ai_settings.usage_daily_empty: No daily usage data in the selected range
ai_settings.summary_language_hint: The language used for AI analysis, translation, and daily report output
ai_settings.auto_translate_title_hint: Automatically translate article titles that are not in your target language
ai_settings.auto_translate_hint: Automatically translate article content in detail view (shows translation under original)
ai_settings.auto_analysis_hint: Automatically generate AI analysis in the background for newly ingested articles, and reuse its summary on the detail page

data_control.confirm_delete: Confirm deleting all data? This action cannot be undone.
data_control.import_description: Import feeds and folders from OPML file
data_control.skipped_items: Skipped {{foldersSkipped}} existing folders and {{feedsSkipped}} existing feeds
data_control.export_description: Export all feeds and folders as OPML file
data_control.clear_ai_cache_description: Delete all AI-generated summaries, analyses, and translations cache
data_control.clear_anubis_cookies_description: Delete all website access credentials (for bypassing protection)
data_control.clear_icon_cache_description: Delete all feed icon files (will re-fetch on next refresh)
data_control.clear_entry_cache_description: Delete all unfocused articles (focused articles are preserved)

auth.register_description: Create an account to start using Gist
auth.username_hint: Only lowercase letters and numbers allowed
auth.nickname_hint: Optional, defaults to username if empty
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.network_error: Unable to connect to server. Please check your network connection.
auth.network_error_description: Please check your network connection or server status and try again
auth.network_error_hint: If accessing via reverse proxy, please verify your proxy configuration and that the target port is reachable

profile.title: Profile
profile.username_readonly: Username cannot be changed after registration

feeds.refresh_in_progress: Refresh in progress, please try again later
feeds.name: Name

ai_analysis_page.title: AI Analyses
ai_analysis_page.description: Browse stored AI analysis results and jump back to the original article.
ai_analysis_page.library_description: Shows the latest 10 completed article analyses that have already been saved to the library.
ai_analysis_page.empty: No stored AI analysis results yet.
ai_analysis_page.load_failed: Failed to load AI analysis results
ai_analysis_page.queue_description: Track AI analysis jobs that are currently running, waiting, or failed.
ai_analysis_page.queue_load_failed: Failed to load the analysis queue
ai_analysis_page.queue_empty: There are no queued AI analysis tasks right now.
ai_analysis_page.queue_refresh_active: Background jobs detected. This page refreshes automatically.
ai_analysis_page.queue_running_hint: AI is currently processing this item. Started at {{time}}.
ai_analysis_page.queue_failed_hint: The latest processing attempt failed at {{time}}.

ai_daily_report_page.title: AI Daily Report
ai_daily_report_page.description: Turn stored AI analyses for a day into narrative briefings plus top stories, tags, entities, and feeds.
ai_daily_report_page.focused_hint: Articles manually highlighted by the user, optionally with custom tags.
ai_daily_report_page.pending_hint_processing: Background AI analysis tasks are still queued or running.
ai_daily_report_page.pending_hint_idle: There are no pending AI analysis tasks right now.
ai_daily_report_page.empty: No AI daily report data is available for the selected date.
ai_daily_report_page.load_failed: Failed to load AI daily report

update.description: Click to refresh and apply the update
